chat.placeholder: Ask a chemistry question, e.g. Calculate the molecular weight of aspirin…
chat.empty_state: Ask ChemAgent a question to start exploring chemistry

compare.title: Full drug-likeness pipeline for aspirin
compare.description: Chain validation, descriptor calculation, and PAINS screening end-to-end.
compare.prompt: Run a complete drug-likeness assessment for aspirin (CC(=O)Oc1ccccc1C(=O)O): start by validating and standardizing the structure with RDKit, then compute full molecular descriptors (MW, LogP, TPSA, QED, SA Score), evaluate Lipinski's Rule of Five, and finally screen for PAINS alerts. Summarize your findings.

properties.title: Scaffold extraction and ibuprofen vs. naproxen comparison
properties.description: Murcko scaffold decomposition + Tanimoto similarity in two chained steps.
properties.prompt: Extract the Murcko core scaffold for both ibuprofen (CC(C)Cc1ccc(C(C)C(=O)O)cc1) and naproxen (CC(c1ccc2cccc(OC)c2c1)C(=O)O), then compute their Tanimoto similarity. Use the scaffold differences to explain the structural basis for their different COX selectivity profiles.

rules.title: Caffeine atomic partial charges and reactive sites
rules.description: Use Gasteiger charges to identify nucleophilic and electrophilic centers.
rules.prompt: Compute Gasteiger partial charges for all atoms in caffeine (Cn1cnc2c1c(=O)n(C)c(=O)n2C). Identify the most negative and most positive atom positions, explain their nucleophilic and electrophilic character, and discuss what this means for N-demethylation metabolism.

workflow.title: Ligand docking prep pipeline for lidocaine
workflow.description: Desalt → 3D conformer generation → PDBQT output, ready for docking.
workflow.prompt: Process lidocaine hydrochloride (CCN(CC)CC(=O)Nc1c(C)cccc1C.Cl) through a full docking preparation pipeline: desalt and standardize with RDKit, generate the lowest-energy 3D conformer using Open Babel, then produce a docking-ready PDBQT file. Explain the key parameter choices at each step.

home.subtitle: Authoritative retrieval · Structured tool calls · Explainable streaming
home.feature1_desc: RDKit & Open Babel powered structure cleanup, pharmacophore analysis, and high-throughput 3D conformer optimization.
home.feature2_desc: Chat context and sidebar parameters work seamlessly — AI can take over your molecule input and parameter orchestration directly.
home.feature3_desc: Split, merge, and force-field score million-compound libraries with in-memory streaming and zero disk overhead.
